Chapter one.

Sherlock Holmes sat in the armchair and listened quietly as the visitor described the strange events of the previous evening.

This is a narrated story, not a business meeting. There are no meeting attendees assigning work. There is no product decision. There are no owners, due dates, action items, next steps, or follow-up tasks.

The narrator continues the story with descriptive details about the room, the street, and the visitor's memory.
